1.content:
I want to change the prefill/mixed kernel  in tpu_inference/kernels/ragged_paged_attention/v3/kernel.py to support short prompts (e.g. 4 seq with 20 tokens) - previously each _ragged_paged_attention_kernel_loop only takes care of seq id - I   
  want you to merge multiple seq id together - so instead of calling mxu 4 times, we can merge 4 seq together, add mask and call mxu only once. I want to implement: 1.  when looping seq_idx in _ragged_paged_attention_kernel, accumulate seq id   
  when total_q_len <= bq_csv and total_kv_len <= bkv_csv to get pairs of start_group_seq_id, end_group_seq_id. 2. change _ragged_paged_attention_kernel_loop to accept a pair of start_group_seq_id, end_group_seq_id instead of seq_id. 3. inside   
  _ragged_paged_attention_kernel_loop, load q and kv between start_group_seq_id, end_group_seq_id all together and compute them together Can you start to implement the whole thing?
